A0166.title: On-Chain Compliance and Regulatory Collaboration
A0166.definition: Collaborating with regulatory authorities to establish on-chain monitoring mechanisms and compliance reporting
A0166.description: Compliance framework: Travel Rule implementation; suspicious transaction reporting; blacklist sharing; regulatory nodes; on-chain regulatory technology; cross-border collaboration; forensic interfaces.
A0166.limitation: Inconsistent regulatory standards; conflict between decentralization and regulation; enforcement challenges
